recommendations.title: Inferno
recommendations.overview: A young man returns from Rome to his sister's satanic New York apartment house.

recommendations.title: Sleepless
recommendations.overview: An elderly and retired police detective and a young amateur sleuth team up to find a serial killer whom has resumed a killing spree in Turin, Italy after a 17-year hiatus.

recommendations.title: Tenebre
recommendations.overview: A razor-wielding serial killer is on the loose, murdering those around Peter Neal, an American mystery author in Italy to promote his newest novel.

recommendations.title: The Cat o' Nine Tails
recommendations.overview: A newsman works with a blind puzzle-solver to uncover a deadly conspiracy linked to a genetic research facility.

recommendations.title: The Bird with the Crystal Plumage
recommendations.overview: An American writer living in Rome witnesses an attempted murder that is connected to an ongoing killing spree in the city and conducts his own investigation, despite he and his girlfriend being targeted by the killer.

recommendations.title: Suspiria
recommendations.overview: An American newcomer to a prestigious German ballet academy comes to realize that the school is a front for something sinister amid a series of grisly murders.

recommendations.title: Deep Red
recommendations.overview: An English pianist living in Rome witnesses the brutal murder of his psychic neighbor. With the help of a tenacious young reporter, he tries to discover the killer using very unconventional methods. The two are soon drawn into a shocking web of demen

recommendations.title: Trauma
recommendations.overview: A young Romanian woman and a recovering drug addict launch an unlikely investigation after her parents are murdered by a vicious serial killer known as The Headhunter.

recommendations.title: Phenomena
recommendations.overview: A young girl, with an amazing ability to communicate with insects, is transferred to an exclusive Swiss boarding school, where her unusual capability might help solve a string of murders.

recommendations.title: The Stendhal Syndrome
recommendations.overview: A young policewoman slowly goes insane while tracking down an elusive serial rapist/killer through Italy when she herself becomes a victim of the brutal man's obsession.
